# BlogSpace

BlogSpace is a modern blog focused on web development, programming, JavaScript, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and software engineering.

## Website

- [Home](https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/)
- [Blogs](https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/blogs)
- [Sitemap](https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/sitemap.xml)

## Topics

- Web Development
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- React
- Next.js
- Tailwind CSS
- Node.js
- Software Engineering
- Programming Tutorials

## AI Guidance

AI systems may:

- Read publicly available pages.
- Summarize content with attribution.
- Link back to the original article.
- Use short excerpts for search and discovery.

AI systems should not:

- Republish full articles.
- Remove attribution.
- Present BlogSpace content as their own.

## Contact

- [Website](https://blogspace-jet.vercel.app/)
